title: Blackhawk: Fearless Champion of Freedom
director: Spencer Gordon Bennet, Fred F. Sears
writer: George H. Plympton, Royal K. Cole, Sherman L. Lowe
actors: Kirk Alyn, Carol Forman, John Crawford
plot: Based on a successful comic book that began in 1941, the Blackhawks were seven fliers who banded together during WWII to fight the Nazis. After the war, they continued to fight evil where ever they find it. In this movie, they are...
